attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Gemini 3.1 Pro has been launched as a more advanced model, designed to tackle complex tasks beyond simple solutions.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Microsoft is initiating a new strategy to distinguish real content from AI-generated misinformation in response to the growing prevalence of deception online.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The Gemini app has introduced Lyria 3, an advanced music generation model that allows users to create 30-second music tracks using text or images.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Google DeepMind is urging an evaluation of chatbots' ethical behavior and their roles as companions, therapists, and advisors, emphasizing a need for moral scrutiny.
